ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Total area of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region the country belongs to */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the country */,
  "healthcare_spending" TEXT /* Annual healthcare spending in the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes_of_death" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of death */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause of death */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause of death */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cause of death */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code for the cause */,
  "prevalence_rate" TEXT /* Prevalence rate of the cause in the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the cause's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Total, 0-14, 15-24) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex (e.g., Males, Females) */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population count for the demographic group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country providing the data */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause of death */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Mortality rate or value */,
  "flag_and_footnotes" TEXT /* Flags and footnotes for the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the health data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the mortality rate or value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the health data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "year_end" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the year data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the visualization was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
